'''Meris VI''' was the outermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Meris system]] in [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. It was a [[Temperature/Legends|frigid]] planet swept by constant [[Water/Legends|ice]] storms. Meris VI had a breathable type II [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] in warmer seasons; in winter, the air was too cold to be safe without a heating mask filter.
